docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATINO, IVAN AS TO DEFENDANT CDR CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
